islands.name: Digital Asset Atoll
islands.description: Explore cryptocurrency wallets, mock transactions, and learn about volatility the hard way.

learning_objectives: Learn about blockchain concepts at a high level
Experience price volatility and its emotional impact on decisions
Differentiate speculative assets from stable investments
provenance.originality_notes: Theme: atoll with distinct crypto-themed zones (not a trading app clone). Verb: quest-driven exploration with mock transactions (not live trading). Structure: NPC mentors guide through volatility scenarios with quiz gates (not open sandbox). Combines resource management with guided dialogue scenarios.

areas.name: Wallet Wharf
areas.description: Set up your first digital wallet and learn about public/private keys.

areas.name: Exchange Plaza
areas.description: A bustling marketplace where digital assets are bought and sold.

areas.name: Volatility Valley
areas.description: Watch prices swing wildly. Learn why crypto is risky and when hype overtakes fundamentals.

items.name: Wallet Seed Phrase
items.description: Your 12-word recovery phrase. Guard it with your life!

items.name: MockCoin Token
items.description: A simulated cryptocurrency used for learning transactions.

items.name: Volatility Report
items.description: A chart showing extreme price swings and the emotions that drive them.

items.name: Digital Asset Medallion
items.description: You understand the basics of digital assets and their risks.

quests.title: Wallet & First Transaction
quests.description: Set up a simulated crypto wallet, send and receive mock transactions, and understand gas fees.
quests.hint: Talk to Satoshi at Wallet Wharf to create your wallet, then visit Exchange Emma to make your first trade.

quests.title: Riding the Rollercoaster
quests.description: Experience a simulated crypto crash. Learn why timing the market fails and how emotions drive bad decisions.
quests.hint: Visit Volatility Valley. Talk to FOMO Fred and HODL Hannah for opposing viewpoints.

nodes.speaker: Satoshi the Guide
nodes.text: Welcome to Wallet Wharf! A crypto wallet doesn't actually hold coins — it holds the keys that prove ownership. Let me show you how it works.

nodes.speaker: Satoshi the Guide
nodes.text: Here's your seed phrase — 12 random words that can recover your wallet. Never share it! Now head to Exchange Plaza to make your first trade.

nodes.speaker: Satoshi the Guide
nodes.text: Think of it like a password that signs every transaction. Your public key is like your email address — anyone can send you crypto. But only you can send crypto out, using your private key.

nodes.speaker: Exchange Emma
nodes.text: This is the Exchange! You can buy and sell digital assets here. Every transaction has a fee — we call it 'gas'. Want to try a mock trade?

nodes.speaker: Exchange Emma
nodes.text: Every transaction on the blockchain costs a small fee that goes to 'miners' or 'validators' who process it. Fees spike when the network is busy — sometimes a $10 transfer costs $50 in fees!

nodes.speaker: FOMO Fred
nodes.text: BRO! CryptoCoin is up 300% this week! I'm going ALL IN! You should too before it's too late!!

nodes.speaker: FOMO Fred
nodes.text: Risk?! The only risk is missing out! …okay fine, last time I went all-in on MoonToken and lost 80%. But THIS TIME is different!

nodes.speaker: FOMO Fred
nodes.text: Crashes are just buying opportunities! …although I did panic-sell my whole portfolio at the bottom last time. Don't be like me. Maybe talk to Hannah — she's way calmer about this stuff.

nodes.speaker: HODL Hannah
nodes.text: Ignore the hype and the FUD. If you believe in the technology long-term, hold through the volatility. But never invest more than you can afford to lose.

nodes.speaker: HODL Hannah
nodes.text: Investing with emotion. People buy when they're euphoric and sell when they're terrified — the exact opposite of what works. Study the Volatility Report and you'll understand.

minigames.name: Mock Crypto Exchange
minigames.description: Buy and sell simulated crypto tokens. Learn about order books, fees, and slippage.

minigames.name: Don't Break the Basket
minigames.description: Crypto swings hard. Spread coins across assets and weather a volatile market year instead of betting it all on one token.
